scenario_name: author skill: router skill with references (tests <100 line body + unlimited refs)
prompt: Read docs/plugin-guide/skills.md and docs/plugin-guide/skill-design.md for reference, then create a code-assist router skill that dispatches to 3 sub-behaviors: generate (new code), refactor (existing code), and document (add docs). The SKILL.md body should be a lean dispatch table under 100 lines. Put detailed instructions for each sub-behavior in .claude/skills/code-assist/references/ files. Put the skill in .claude/skills/code-assist/SKILL.md
